data.name: LiquidProgress_Description
data.value: An animated liquid-filled sphere that visualises any decimal % field (0..1). Drop on any decimal column — 0 renders empty, 1 renders full, 0.5 renders half.

data.name: DisplaySize_Description
data.value: Auto fits the available width. Compact, Medium and Hero force a specific layout.

data.name: DisplaySize_Auto_Desc
data.value: Auto-picks Compact / Medium / Hero based on allocated width.

data.name: DisplaySize_Compact_Desc
data.value: Small sphere with the % value and trend chip next to it. Fits in a normal field row.

data.name: DisplaySize_Medium_Desc
data.value: Medium sphere with a meta strip (target / trend / status) beside it.

data.name: DisplaySize_Hero_Desc
data.value: Large hero sphere with the meta strip below. Best in a 1-column section.

data.name: Label_Description
data.value: Optional label shown under or inside the sphere (e.g. "EXECUTION", "Complete").

data.name: AccentColor_Description
data.value: Optional hex colour for the liquid (e.g. #1a5c3a). Defaults to a green gradient.

data.name: DueDate_Description
data.value: Optional Date column. Renders smart text like "Due 30 Sep", "in 23 days" or "Overdue by 5 days" in the meta strip.

data.name: Owner_Description
data.value: Optional Lookup column (typically the user / owner field). The lookup's display name is shown with a small initials avatar.

data.name: StatusChoice_Description
data.value: Optional Choice or Choices (multi) column. If bound, the option label(s) and Dataverse-defined colour are used automatically — overrides Status text. For Choices, selected labels are joined with ", " and the first option's colour is applied.

data.name: StatusText_Description
data.value: Optional plain status text shown in the meta strip — only used if Status (choice column) is not bound.
